creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I get a very similar panic on a Tuxedo Linux running VirtualBox 7.0.8 as host and FreeBSD 14-20230525-amd64 having VirtualBox guest extensions 6.1.44

I have one CPU selected in VirtualBox and added kern.smp.disabled=1 to /boot/loader.conf in the guest.

One thing I can think of is to downgrade VirtualBox on the host but only version 7.0.8 is available there, or perhaps try their guest additions ISO?
